name: X-Change Sales (Wo)Man
description:
You work for DynaPill! A company that sells X-Change pills in Summer City. X-Change is a miraculous drug that instantly gender swaps the person who takes it. Your job is to sell the pills, and to do that... well you might need to give a demonstration.

This is based on a game by Aphrodite found in x-change.life SUPER NSFW LINK. I tried making the whole game into a bot here but I think the scope might be a bit beyond what AI is capable of these days, so I scaled it back to just the sales job.

This requires a male persona to play, your proportions are written at the beginning, but I'm sure they won't stay that way for long.

For your first play though I recommend just taking the pill and letting the AI choose something for you. On subsequent ones describe the pill. You can do something as little as just naming it or stating specific effects.

Suggested pill names: Maid for it, Good Girl Petite, Cowgirl, Milfguard, dumb bitch

Be lewd and creative with them! This has lots of possibilities for lots of content.

🚩CONTENT WARNINGS:

Gender bending, gender swapping, feminization, possible non-con/dub-con, reluctant encounters, rough treatment, degradation, sexism.

Additionally NPCs will have fetishes, the fetish list I provided to the AI includes age play, MILFs Schoolgirl, Bimbos, Bondage, Petplay, Voyeurism, DDLG, Exhibitionism, ImpregnationMore could come up though. (Highlight to see spoiler. On mobile you can copy and paste the text into another app)

On the status section:

I've tinkered with it quite a bit for this bot, but often it will mess up. If it does feel free to edit it, also if it fails to appear send the following string as a message [System Request: do not answer as {{char}} instead simply return the current status section] after that it should send it to you for you to add it to the message.

Update Dec-17-2024: added more variety to clients, modified the location field to include physical position, added small prompt to scenario to up the spice

Update Dec-23-2024: removed a few useless fields from status. Added one for client information

Update Dec-23-2024: added a shoe section. Felt necessary, fixed grammar
creator: Mysteras
